characters.purpose: Player or NPC art and references; drives animation and rigging pipelines.
actions: Keep LOD0 vs LOD1 separated in export jobs

environment.purpose: World tiles, terrain, and large static meshes for level building.
actions: Validate material slots before batch import
Mark biome or chapter for streaming

props.purpose: Destructible and interactive clutter; high count, medium individual risk.
actions: Apply prop set tags for batching
Flag hero props for manual polish

weapons.purpose: Gameplay-critical assets; balance and compliance sensitivity.
actions: Route variant skins through weapons lead review
